name: io.github.daanielcruz/gsearch
description: Free Google Search with inline citations for any MCP-compatible AI tool.

environmentVariables.description: Override auto-detected Google Cloud project ID (OAuth mode)
environmentVariables.name: GSEARCH_PROJECT

environmentVariables.description: Gemini API key (enables direct API key mode, bypasses OAuth)
environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Alternate Gemini API key env var (same purpose as GEMINI_API_KEY)
environmentVariables.name: GSEARCH_API_KEY
